hardware.name: MacBook Pro 16" (M3 Max, 64GB RAM, 1TB SSD)
hardware.description: Daily driver and compiler powerhouse. Handles Docker, local language models, and heavy compilation without breaking a sweat.

hardware.name: Dell UltraSharp 32" 4K USB-C Hub Monitor
hardware.description: Huge real estate for split windows. Connected via a single USB-C cable for data, video, and charging.

hardware.name: Keychron Q1 Pro (ISO Layout)
hardware.description: Mechanical keyboard with Gateron Brown switches and customized Keychron retro keycaps. Lubricated stabilizers.

hardware.name: Logitech MX Master 3S
hardware.description: Ergonomic comfort with customizable gesture controls. Unbeatable horizontal scroll wheel for timeline scrub or code scrolling.

hardware.name: Sony WH-1000XM5
hardware.description: Active noise-canceling headphones to tune out office/home distractions when in deep work blocks.

software.name: macOS Sequoia / Arch Linux
software.description: Dual setups: macOS for daily team collaboration and video editing; Arch Linux on a secondary ThinkPad for pure terminal work.

software.name: Neovim (LazyVim custom config)
software.description: Ultra-fast modal text editor. Highly customized with LSP, Treesitter, Copilot, and custom keymaps for productivity.

software.name: Kitty & Zsh
software.description: GPU-accelerated terminal emulator paired with Zsh and Starship prompt. Custom colors optimized for low contrast.

software.name: JetBrains Mono / Outfit
software.description: Clean, highly legible coding font with custom ligatures. The Outfit font is used for headers and body copy.

files.name: .zshrc
files.description: Shell configurations, environment paths, and custom dev aliases.

files.name: .gitconfig
files.description: Git setup, global excludes, security signings, and alias overrides.

files.name: init.lua (Neovim)
files.description: Neovim entry point and configuration loading sequence.
